archetypes.name: Minimal
archetypes.description: Spare layout, plenty of whitespace, focus on typography.
archetypes.preview_html: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 120'><rect width='200' height='120' fill='#fafaf9'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='80' height='10' fill='#1c1917'/><rect x='20' y='40' width='160' height='4' fill='#a8a29e'/><rect x='20' y='52' width='160' height='4' fill='#a8a29e'/></svg>

archetypes.name: Bold
archetypes.description: Heavy type, saturated accent, generous padding.
archetypes.preview_html: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 120'><rect width='200' height='120' fill='#0c0a09'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='120' height='18' fill='#14b8a6'/><rect x='20' y='48' width='160' height='4' fill='#e7e5e4'/><rect x='20' y='60' width='160' height='4' fill='#e7e5e4'/></svg>

archetypes.name: Playful
archetypes.description: Rounded shapes, soft shadows, cheerful accent colors.
archetypes.preview_html: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 120'><rect width='200' height='120' fill='#fef3c7'/><circle cx='45' cy='55' r='20' fill='#f97316'/><rect x='80' y='40' width='100' height='8' rx='4' fill='#78350f'/><rect x='80' y='56' width='100' height='8' rx='4' fill='#78350f'/></svg>

parameters.name: density
parameters.label: Information density
parameters.description: How much information is shown per screen.

parameters.name: contrast
parameters.label: Visual contrast
parameters.description: Luminance delta between text and surface.

parameters.name: motion
parameters.label: Motion intensity
parameters.description: How much animation and transition the UI uses.
